prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool); Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.5 kg; Height 182.4 cm; BMI 24.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 10.2%), FPG (12 months ago 192mg/dL; 9 months ago 239mg/dL; 6 months ago 269mg/dL; 3 months ago 272mg/dL; current 278mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.2kg; 9 months ago 80.7kg; 6 months ago 79.3kg; 3 months ago 79.2kg; current 82.5kg), Height (12 months ago 182.4cm; 9 months ago 182.4cm; 6 months ago 182.4cm; 3 months ago 182.4cm; current 182.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 61U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 60U/L; current 62U/L), AST (12 months ago 59U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 60U/L; current 55U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 146mg/g; 9 months ago 116mg/g; 6 months ago 131mg/g; 3 months ago 180mg/g; current 175mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 153mg/dL; 6 months ago 138mg/dL; 3 months ago 135mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.12 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
